resources.string: Mines Monero (XMR) using this device\'s CPU only — no cloud component. Uses significant CPU, drains battery, and generates heat while running. Payout comes directly from the pool you choose to the wallet address you enter above.

This app performs real Monero (XMR) mining using only this device's CPU — there is no cloud or remote mining, and no third party sees a cut of your hashrate beyond the pool fee and the optional xmrig developer donation you set above.

Running it will:
• Use significant CPU and drain your battery
• Make the device run hot — the app automatically pauses mining if the device gets too hot and resumes once it cools down, but it can still get warm before that kicks in
• Keep running in the foreground (with a visible, stoppable notification) until you tap Stop, and may automatically resume in the background if Android kills the app process (e.g. under memory pressure) while a session is active
• Send your configured wallet address to the pool you specify, so make sure you trust that pool and control that wallet

Mining rewards are calculated and paid by the pool, not by this app — payout amount and timing depend entirely on the pool's terms.
